emails.body: Re: NEW: Generator Interconnections: A Primer on Procedures and Agreements Mary--For $395, a CD rom of this would be helpful (as opposed to my giant stack of paper on my desk method). I'll look into this with Linda Lawrence to see if it makes sense to order. Thanks! Mary Hain 02/01/2001 04:35 PM
